data.name: A Whore New Ball Game
data.detailed_description:
Wishlist our new game!


關於此遊戲


A Whore New Ball Game is a netorase/cuckold visual novel about prostitution played from either just the husband's or both the husband's and wife's perspective.


You own an electronics store with your wife, but competition from the bigger chain store nearby and the internet are hurting your business so much a visit from a customer has become a rarity. A visit from a rich customer ends up giving you the idea to make some money to pay off your debt: invite people over to have sex with your wife for money.


The main character is a husband and owner of a failing electronics store. He has a fetish for seeing his wife sleep with other men.


Your wife helps out in the store and is even willing to give prostitution a shot if it helps save the store and excites you... A rich customer who is the first to suggest paying to have his way with your wife.


A young lesbian woman and customer of your wife.

data.short_description: A Whore New Ball Game is a cuckold visual novel in which you help your financially struggling store survive by selling your wife to strangers.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any sound card
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
